title: Price's Candles Tapered Dinner Candles Ivory Unscented Wax Pack of 50 | 7 Hour Burn Time Elegant Long Candles for Home Decor, Events, Celebrations & Dining
features: Elegant Tapered Candles for Formal Settings: Refined tapered dinner candles add a classic touch to any table setup, ideal for weddings, dinner parties, and elegant home decor arrangements.
Long-Lasting 7 Hour Burn Time: Each candle provides up to 7 hours of burn time, offering consistent illumination for extended events, dining, or evening ambiance without frequent replacements.
Clean and Unscented Design for Any Occasion: Made with a clean-burning, unscented wax formula, these candles ensure a neat experience—ideal for enclosed spaces, food settings, or sensitive guests.
Ivory Finish for Versatile Styling: The soft ivory color suits any decor theme—from rustic to modern—making it easy to incorporate into table settings, religious ceremonies, or seasonal displays.
Value Pack of 50 for Any Occasion: This bulk candle set includes 50 high-quality wax sticks, ideal for everyday use or stocking up for events, festive gatherings, or restaurant and catering needs.
